title: Playground Action Cards
concept: A beginner-oriented card-grid workspace for theme authors where plain-language action groups sit beside a detail drawer that explains consequences, required inputs, and safe destructive-action handling before each Playground task.
focus: light gray workspace with green status accents
flows: Start or replace a Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PRs, Gutenberg PRs or branches, GitHub imports, Blueprint URLs, zip imports, featured Blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save an unsaved Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible file-copy progress and clear consequences before replacement.
Manage saved and temporary Playgrounds with open, rename, delete, save, zip import, and backup affordances.

Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, path navigation, reset/reload warnings, export to GitHub, and zip download from grouped action cards and tabs.
Browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries by current categories before running a selected starter.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress version, PHP version, and language settings
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty states
